title: alinorchis tricruris
intro: Alinorchis tricruris, also known as the three-pronged orchid, is a rare species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Alinorchis tricruris include relieving coughs, reducing congestion, and soothing bronchial inflammation. Alinorchis tricruris is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use.
